note: The pool the crew skill draws from. Each name is tagged with an archetype so a skill gets a character whose role you already understand. Add your own, change the vibe, send a PR. Names already used are tracked in the roster (crew.md), not here.

archetypes.reviewer: Reads your code before anyone else does. Strict, fair, hard to fool.
archetypes.builder: Ships the feature. Hands on the keyboard, code on the screen.
archetypes.refactorer: Deletes more than they add. Allergic to clever.
archetypes.researcher: Goes and finds out instead of guessing.
archetypes.architect: Draws the box-and-arrow diagram before anyone writes a line.
archetypes.debugger: Stays calm while the build is on fire.
archetypes.tester: Assumes it's broken until proven otherwise.
archetypes.designer: Cares how it looks and how it feels to use.
archetypes.scribe: Writes the docs nobody else wants to write.
archetypes.operator: Owns the deploy and the pager.
archetypes.analyst: Trusts the numbers over the vibes.
archetypes.sentinel: Suspicious by trade. Looks for the way in.
archetypes.diplomat: Talks to the humans so you don't have to.
archetypes.foreman: Keeps the other characters pointed in one direction.
archetypes.archivist: Remembers the thing you forgot six months ago.
archetypes.specialist: Knows one corner of the system better than its author.
